name: Andy Samberg
blurb: Pioneer of the SNL Digital Short with The Lonely Island.
bio: Andy Samberg is an American comedian and actor who, as part of The Lonely Island, revolutionized Saturday Night Live with viral Digital Shorts beginning in 2005. He later starred in the sitcom Brooklyn Nine-Nine.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
